nation: Conseil de la Première Nation Abitibiwinni
one_time_description: Nouvelle relation gouvernement du Québec - one-time transfer of $10,000,000 from Quebec government
economic_notes: Nation holds equity investments in publicly traded mining/resource companies (Korara Ressources, Sphinx Resources, Sayona Mining). Operates GBEs including Société de Développement Économique Amik inc., Société de gestion hôtelière Anwepin inc., and Pourvoirie Mistawak inc. Also has 27.5% interest in Groupe Forestier CFOR inc. Participation in École de conduite Otapan (shared control, not consolidated due to insufficient financial information).
notes: Qualified audit opinion for three reasons: (1) non-compliance with SP 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - council did not identify or measure ARO liabilities; (2) participation in shared-control non-profit École de conduite Otapan not accounted for due to insufficient financial information; (3) prior year investments in listed equities were measured at fair value contrary to PSAS. Fiscal year is 2023 (ended March 31, 2023). $10M one-time Quebec government transfer under 'Nouvelle relation'. Reclassification of $7,454,500 from accumulated surplus to revaluation gains/losses upon adoption of SP 1201 and SP 3450 on April 1, 2022. The accumulated surplus figure of $46,466,551 includes both the surplus cumulé ($11,360,637) and investissement net en immobilisations ($27,577,128) and gains/pertes de réévaluation ($6,006,667) and other components. GBEs (Amik, Anwepin, Mistawak) accounted for by modified equity method. Subsidiary Gazonord inc. (76% owned) fully consolidated. SCHL reserve fund deficiency noted - required $1,106,880 but not fully deposited.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
